title: PO Requisition Input Row
description: Schema for a single row in the PO requisition input file (XLSX or CSV). All required fields must be non-empty; optional fields are validated if present.

PO Number.description: Unique identifier for the purchase order.

Requisition Date.description: Date the requisition was submitted (ISO 8601: YYYY-MM-DD).

Needed By Date.description: Optional. Requested delivery date. Must be >= Requisition Date.

Cost Center.description: Cost centre code. Must match pattern CC-NNN.

Requester Name.description: Full name of the employee submitting the request.

Vendor ID.description: Vendor identifier. Must match pattern V-NNNN and exist in vendor_allowlist.csv.

Payment Terms.description: Optional. Standard payment terms agreed with the vendor.

Category.description: Optional. Procurement category for spend analysis.

Line Item Description.description: Plain-language description of what is being purchased.

Quantity.description: Number of units. Must be a positive integer >= 1.

Unit Price ($).description: Price per unit in USD. Must be > 0.

Subtotal ($).description: Optional. Pre-tax subtotal. If present, should equal Quantity × Unit Price.

Tax Rate (%).description: Optional. Applicable tax rate as a decimal (e.g. 0.08 = 8%). Must be between 0 and 0.15.

Tax Amount ($).description: Optional. Computed tax amount in USD.

Total Amount ($).description: Final total in USD. Must equal Quantity × Unit Price within ±$0.02 rounding tolerance.

Approval Tier.description: Optional on input — populated by agent. Auto-Approve | Manager Approval | VP Approval.

Approval Reason.description: Optional on input — populated by agent.

Status.description: Optional on input — populated by agent.

Notes.description: Optional. Free-text notes from the requester.
